description_zh: Cartier（卡地亚）是全球最具影响力的奢华珠宝与腕表品牌之一，由路易-弗朗索瓦·卡地亚（Louis-François Cartier）于1847年在法国巴黎创立。品牌被誉为"皇帝的珠宝商，珠宝商的皇帝"，自创立以来便与欧洲王室紧密相连，英国国王爱德华七世曾盛赞卡地亚为"商人之王与王者的珠宝商"。卡地亚在珠宝设计史上留下了诸多不朽经典：1910年代的Tutti Frutti水果锦囊风格系列、1924年推出的Trinity三环戒指，以及标志性的Panthère猎豹系列，以其大胆灵动的动物造型设计成为品牌灵魂图腾。卡地亚在腕表领域的成就同样辉煌，1904年为飞行家阿尔伯特·桑托斯-杜蒙设计的Santos腕表，是世界上第一枚现代腕表。其后推出的Tank坦克系列、Ballon Bleu蓝气球系列等均为腕表史上不朽经典。如今，卡地亚隶属于历峰集团（Richemont），在全球开设超过200家精品店，其位于巴黎和平街13号的旗舰店更是全球奢侈品牌的朝圣地。

languages.en: Cartier is one of the world's most prestigious luxury jewelry and watch brands, founded in 1847 by Louis-François Cartier in Paris. Acclaimed as 'the jeweler of kings and the king of jewelers,' Cartier has served European royalty since its inception. The brand's iconic creations include the Tutti Frutti design, the Trinity ring (1924), and the legendary Panthère collection. In horology, Cartier invented the modern wristwatch in 1904 with the Santos for aviator Alberto Santos-Dumont, followed by the timeless Tank and Ballon Bleu collections. Each creation reflects Cartier's mastery of innovative design, precious gemstones, and meticulous craftsmanship. Now owned by Richemont, Cartier operates over 200 boutiques worldwide. Its historic flagship at 13 Rue de la Paix in Paris remains a pilgrimage site for luxury enthusiasts and jewelry connoisseurs.
